programme.title: E5 - Trouble In Paradise
programme.desc: Cody battles the dangers of dehydration searching for water and fire-making tools, while Joe gears up for mortal combat with aggressive feral boars.

programme.title: E10 - Rocky Mountain High
programme.desc: Stranded 9000 feet above sea level in the snow covered Rocky Mountains, Cody and Joe battle hypothermia and stay alive long enough.

programme.title: E6 - The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: As small-town secrets unravel, Sheriff Mike Gormley uncovers a dangerous love triangle and a vengeful killer who is willing to risk his own blood for retribution.

programme.title: E7 - Twelve Hours Of Terror
programme.desc: As bodies continue to pile up, the urgency escalates, pitting Detective Dave Frankel in a race against time to capture a deranged spree killer.

programme.title: E3 - The Bouncer
programme.desc: As Hot Snakes Media digs deeper, stories of violence and alleged mob ties reveal that Benjaman Kyle's past may be darker and deadlier than anyone believed.

programme.desc: As bodies continue to pile up, the urgency escalates, pitting Detective Dave Frankel in a race against time to capture a deranged spree killer.

programme.title: Health For Today
programme.desc: Difficult to understand medical care is easily explained in this program as well as tips on healthcare.

programme.title: E55
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Exercise For Everyone
programme.desc: An easy-to-do exercise program for everyone from children to the elderly.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Ginbayashi Yoko (Koike Eiko), a world-class chef, loses everything when her restaurant's owner vanishes with the profits. Now supporting two children, she takes a job as a prison nutritionist, where her inventive meals begin to win over inmates. But when a former inmate is arrested again, Yoko is forced to confront a difficult question: Can people truly change? A new quest begins - earning three “Musholan” stars behind bars.

programme.title: The 49Th Creative TV Drama Award-Winning Drama 'One Day, My Wife's Panties...'
programme.desc: The Creative TV Drama Award, jointly hosted by the Television and Radio Writers' Association and NHK, presents its 49th Grand Prize winner -selected from 1,056 entries-now brought to life. Namiki Sota (Kura Yuki), who struggles to fit into society, becomes obsessed after accidentally losing his wife's panties in a river. Later that stormy night, he rushes to retrieve them, causing a public commotion. Inspired by the incident, his wife Yui (Yamashita Mizuki), an aspiring manga artist, turns the episode into a comic-prompting Sota to take a bold step.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news from Tokyo.

programme.title: E117
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: BS Special 'The Light of Hope: Asian University For Women'
programme.desc: Asian University for Women, founded in Bangladesh in 2008, welcomes talented students from countries where women face deep inequality and seeks to cultivate future female leaders. Women from 20 Asian nations study here, including those who secretly fled Afghanistan and Rohingya refugees pursuing knowledge for their communities, all striving to build a new future despite discrimination and poverty.

programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: E1 - Titan Games Premiere
programme.desc: The Titan Games' premieres with an action-packed two-hour episode. Host and Executive Producer Dwayne Johnson reveals the competition’s new format with regional brackets and the addition of Professional Athlete Titans representing each region. In this episode, competitors from the Central division will compete in a best of three competition where the winner will move on to battle a Pro-Athlete Titan on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Female competitors will have to face two-time Olympic gold-medal winning and current undisputed boxing world champion Claressa Shields, while the males will take on NFL Iron Man Legend and 10x Pro-Bowler Joe Thomas. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

That Demon Within
programme.desc: By a strange twist of fate, dutiful Hong Kong policeman Dave Wong saves the life of the leader of a violent gang of armed robbers. When they commit another crime, Dave is determined to put an end to their activities. He works with the leader, whom the gang had betrayed, to engineer a plan to wreak havoc within the gang and let the gangsters kill one another. But it becomes increasingly obvious to Dave and to his colleagues that Dave is suffering from a severe mental disorder, and Dave finds that instead of upholding the law as a righteous police officer, he has now become a fugitive wanted for murder.

programme.title: She Remembers, He Forgets
programme.desc: Unfulfilled at work and dissatisfied with her marital life, a middle-aged woman attends a high school reunion and finds a floodgate of flashbacks of her salad days open before her mind's eyes. She was inseparable with two boys 20 years ago but married one of them eventually. All the memories eventually zero in on one critical incident that changed her life and those of the boys forever...

programme.title: Stars in Focus: Chow Yun-fat: God of Gambler's Return
programme.desc: Five years have passed since the events of the first God of Gamblers film. Ko Chun is now living a peaceful retirement on his French estate with his pregnant wife Wan Yau, while his disciples Knife and Sing have become world-renowned in their own right. Chun declines repeated challenges from other top-ranked gamblers, having given up gambling in favor of the quiet life. Chun's friend and former bodyguard, Lung Wu, the 'God Of Guns', comes to pay him a visit. While the two are away from the house for a friendly shooting competition, Chau Siu-Chee, a Taiwanese gambler and the world's number one contender to Ko Chun's title, arrives and murders his wife and unborn son in order to goad Chun into a gambling match. After a shootout with Chau Siu-Chee's henchmen, Ko Chun arrives to discover his wife dying. With her last breath, she asks Chun to promise that he will not gamble or admit his real identity for one year, in the hopes that he will not lose his life in an impulsive act of

programme.title: Exclusive Premiere: Crayon Shinchan the Movie: Super-Hot! The Spicy Kasukabe Dancers
programme.desc: To commemorate the sister city relationship between Kasukabe and Mushibai Hagashimiru in India, the 'Kasukabe Children's Carnival' was held. Word spread that winning the carnival's dance competition would earn a trip to India. Shin-chan, alongside with his trusty Kasukabe friends lit up the stage with a spectacular performance, clinching the championship and setting off for the curry-scented and starlit wonders of India! But little did they know, a thrilling adventure had beguan. During their India journey, Shin-chan and Bo-chan wandered into a shady general store and bought a peculiar nose-shaped backpack, unaware of its dark secret. Disaster struck when Bo-chan accidentally stuffed a mysterious slip of paper from the backpack in his nose, unleashing an evil force that transformed him into “Tyrant” Bo-chan, a rampaging villain with the power to destroy the world! With Bo-chan's personality warped and his actions spiralling out of control, can Shin-chan and his friends harnes

programme.desc: When a seller comes in with a poster by Henri de Toulouse-Lautrec, will it make an impression on Rick, or will he bid adieu? Chum finds some 1912 Yale baseball uniforms. Is it a home run or a strikeout?

programme.title: E126
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E16 - Art Deco
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: E8 - Paname Plays With Stereotypes
programme.desc: Elegant, romantic, grumpy, always in a hurry: Parisians have quite a reputation. The Paris 2024 Olympic Games have changed the world's perception of the capital-turns out it's not that dirty, and its residents are rather welcoming! Today, which cliches still stick to their skin?

programme.title: E4 - The Unusual 2 Cvs
programme.desc: Laurent and Oceane travel to Saint-Ouen-le-Brisoult to discover unusual 2 CV models. Focus on the Peugeot 205 Rallye. Michel meets Florie, who restores seats for vintage cars and motorcycles.

programme.title: E8 - Charming Bivouacs!
programme.desc: With Scarabeo Camp, Belgian Vincent T'sas offers some fantastic escapes: bivouacs in the desert. Also featuring: made-to-measure perfume; auction, a Delvaux in New York; Belgian watches on Monegasque time.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S8
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E14 - Rigatoni With Mushrooms And Pan-Seared Salmon
programme.desc: Two recipes on the menu: rigatoni with mushrooms and almonds, and pan-seared salmon with ginger and maple sauce.

programme.title: E14 - Rigatoni With Mushrooms And Pan-Seared Salmon
programme.desc: Two recipes on the menu: rigatoni with mushrooms and almonds, and pan-seared salmon with ginger and maple sauce.

programme.title: E37 - Here's A Robin
programme.desc: At 6 years old the cheerful mischievous Koumi dreams of knowing all the animals in the world. Thanks to her picture book, she's able to head off and meet them.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S8
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E29 - The Last Of The Last
programme.desc: During a reenacted duel, a participant is fatally injured by a weapon that was supposed to be fake. The shooter? A high profile lawyer with whom Marleau has old scores to settle. A new battle begins between the captain and the main suspect, who claims he is being framed.

programme.title: E4 - The United States
programme.desc: In New York, Raed Hammoud visits the Brooklyn Bridge Park Stadium, a magnificent pitch with a breathtaking panoramic view. It shows that in a city traditionally devoted to basketball and baseball, football holds a special place, both on the pitch and in people's hearts.

programme.title: E2 - Sylvain Huchette, Mael Kervennal
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: E1 - Where Dreams Are Born
programme.desc: Morocco celebrates the return from exile of its king, Mohammed V. Above the crowd, an airplane distributes leaflets. On board: Touria Chaoui, the first Moroccan female pilot in the Arab world.

programme.title: E13 - Alice Tuyet (Paris)/Benoit Chaigneau (Vietnam)
programme.desc: How can French gastronomy be reinvented? Richard Orlinski meets talents who break the codes without renouncing their roots. Alice Tuyet, a self-taught Parisian chef, fuses her Franco-Vietnamese heritage and offers innovative vegan cuisine. In her restaurant in the Saint-Honore district, she revisits classics by integrating sauces rich in flavor and surprising textures. The gourmet journey continues in Vietnam with former culinary columnist Benoit Chaigneau, now a restaurateur and fish sauce producer. Between colorful markets and production workshops, Benoit combines local know-how and French gastronomic standards to create an exceptional smoked sauce.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E311 - The Toy Box / The Pit
programme.desc: The babies travel to Toyland and find their toys have come to life... but Tommy and Chuckie have been turned into toys themselves!//When Phil gets stuck in a pit, the babies wonder why Lil would rather chase a porcupine than help get her brother out.

programme.title: E111 - X Marks the Pot
programme.desc: A classic villain returns to his former lair, only to find the Star Family inhabiting it.

programme.desc: The twins and Marsupilamis save an egg from the Jaguar, which hatches into a baby crocodile. // The Marsupilamis are helping people, and Callie wants to find out who the 'Amazing Coat Man' hero is.

programme.title: E102 - Faulty Powers
programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: E118 - Wi-Fi in the Sky
programme.desc: Tori's flight home is delayed leaving her no time to finish a school project with her friends. She attempts to get the work done with them over video chat but things keep getting in the way.

programme.title: E313 - Squidina's Holidaze Special
programme.desc: Squidina has to direct her school holiday play, but her script was mangled by Patrick.

programme.title: E217 - The Packer Packer Bowl
programme.desc: Bacon becomes the West Packer High football mascot, but when the school's rival steals him as part of a prank, Lay Lay will stop at nothing to get her beloved pig back.

programme.title: E310 - Green Fingers
programme.desc: After Schwoz creates a disease that accidentally effects Charlotte, Henry, his family, and even Ray, he quarantines them in Henry’s house in order to find a cure.

programme.title: E216 - Twin Henrys
programme.desc: Henry has Schwoz's shape-shifting android fill in for him at a family dinner so he can watch the MMA fight of the year with Charlotte and Ray.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Identical twins – a musician living in New York, and a mechanic living in Hong Kong – are separated in childhood but are unexpectedly reunited years later when the musician travels to Hong Kong for a concert.

programme.desc: Martial artists join Red Lotus Flower Society to overthrow evil emperor. Governor hunts society members. Kung fu practitioner falls for merchant's daughter amid kung fu contest for her hand. Gender role reversal comedy ensues.

programme.desc: A third-rate British spy is sent to an island, unaware he is there to lure Soviet spies.

programme.title: E622 - Pups Save A Humsquatch / Pups Save A Far Flung Flying Disc
programme.desc: Travelling Travis yelps for help when he finds a mysterious creature in trouble. The PAW Patrol heads to Foggy Bottom to save a Humsquatch! // When a robo-toy causes mayhem in Adventure Bay, Ryder knows who to call to save the far flung flying disc!

programme.title: E122 - Barbabright Has A Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: E301 - The Crew Builds A Vet Clinic / The Crew Builds A Mermaid Party
programme.desc: When the traveling veterinarian Dr. Diwa can't finish all her checkups in Builder Cove in time, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Lily's mermaid-themed birthday party is called off when it starts to rain. Time for a construction solution!

programme.title: E204 - The Crew Builds Library Treasure Tunnels / The Crew Builds A Super Snack Di
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew's favorite book series has new additions! But when there's no room for them in the library, the pups have to get creative.// The pups have a surprise just for Rubble... a snack dispenser! But will they finish it before Rubble finds out?

programme.title: E123 - Pups And The Beanstalk / Pups Save The Turbots
programme.desc: Rubble decides to nap under a tree at Farmer Yumi's when suddenly Adventure Bay gets a huge problem - Alex the Giant! // When Cap'n Turbot needs to get a picture of a rare bird, his French cousin decides to help but gets caught on a cliff!

programme.title: E202 - Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: E745 - Doctors
programme.desc: When Tiddles the Tortoise gets stuck in a tree, Pedro Pony has trouble trying to rescue him!

programme.title: E223 - Granddad Dog's Garage
programme.desc: Peppa's car runs out of petrol but thankfully Granddad Dog's garage isn't far away. With one phone call, Granddad Dog is on his way. He tows Peppa's car back to his garage.

programme.title: E901 - Liberty Makes A New Friend / Pups Save The Pup Pup Boogie Contest
programme.desc: Liberty mistakenly brings a bear into town, thinking it's someone's pet. She must fix her mistake and rescue Chickaletta. // Francois' hot-air balloon goes out of control before the Pup Pup Boogie Contest. The Pups, with Liberty, race to the rescue.

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E202 - Time Out
programme.desc: Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas.

programme.title: E312 - Bats All Folks / The Handbag Of Doom
programme.desc: Scratch's holiday to the Secret Island goes awry when the noise from her tablet threatens the rare bat's visit to the island. // Lady Fluffpot gets Prof Scratch to increase her handbag storage - but Scratch's widget sucks in everything around it.

programme.title: E102 - Mr Dinosaur Is Lost
programme.desc: George's favourite toy is Mr.Dinosaur. One day Mr.Dinosaur gets stuck up a tree and George thinks he is lost, so Peppa helps George find him.

programme.title: E122 - Barbabright Has A Secret / Super Duper Cool
programme.desc: Barbabright acts strangely. What is he hiding ? The Barbabbabies will do anything to find out. // The Barbapapa decide to save energy. But their efforts are undermined by Barbabright and Barbabelle who build a secret energy-consuming project.

programme.title: E202 - Cookies
programme.desc: Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him.

programme.title: E120 - The Barbababies' World
programme.desc: The Barbapapa family spends a day at the beach. Divided into 2 teams, the barbababies fight over a sandy peninsula.

programme.title: E108 - The Competition Prize / Marvelous Moustaches
programme.desc: The Barbabies win a touchpad. They all want to use it and snaffle it one after another. // Barbazoo collects photos of moustached celebrities. Unfortunately, it's impossible to find the last one: Charles Horseshoe-Furlip. He suspects a conspiracy...

programme.title: E109 - Let Justice Be Done / The Great Spring Clean
programme.desc: Barbabeau forgot to return his book to the library. As Mr Strict the librarian is visiting Barbapapa today, Barbabeau decides to run away. // Barbamama wants the barbababies to tidy their bedrooms. They're hiding to escape the drudgery.

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Pirate Ship Cafe / The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Exper
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.title: E2 - To Catch a Legend
programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: E5 - Mexico's Artificial Reefs
programme.desc: From opportunistic pirate ships, to well-armed navy vessels, Mexico’s Yucatan Peninsula is steeped in maritime history.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef’s main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

E7
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 《祝卿好》改編自伊人睽睽的小説《我的錦衣衞大人》，講述了刁蠻嬌憨又霸道的長樂郡主劉泠偶遇武功高強的冷峻金麟衞沈宴，展開花式追逐的故事。

programme.title: E7 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E5 - Hybrid Games
programme.desc: Adam has an idea for a new event for hybrid athletes called Hybrid Games, so the team travels to W.A to be guinea pigs with powerlifting, Xterra and a beach OCR.

programme.title: E6 - Turf Games
programme.desc: As the team completes the three brutal events scheduled in 48 hours, Adam plans a surprise return to the East Coast with a Turf Games event in Sydney.

programme.title: E9 - Sara’s Favourites
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: E1 - The Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc:
World champion freediver Marina Kazankova is on a mission, to free dive the Great Barrier Reef.
Capable of holding her breath for 7-minutes at a time, Marina travels to the iconic reef, swimming with turtles and giant groper, diving on ship wrecks and through awesome caves, all on a single breath of air.
Capturing each challenge in glorious 4K, this series brings you face to face with the very best of the Great Barrier Reef’s corals and creatures.

programme.title: E2 - Rob Brydon
programme.desc: Funny man Rob Brydon joins Bear Grylls for an adventure he won’t forget as he takes on a mission in the Mountains of Snowdonia.

programme.title: E9 - Highlight 9
programme.desc: In this episode crane operator Nick, is called out to a very unusual job removing two old portable cabins from a recycling yard and replacing with new ones. But with each cabin weighing at least four tonnes and overhead electrical cables to negotiate this is a highly hazardous job. Seasoned recovery op Jim’s must rescue an abandoned Toyota from a live lane on the M1. Recovery op Rory visits a depot in Milton Keynes to recover an 8-ton tractor unit normally used to transport pizza. Meanwhile rescue driver Jon must tow a 44-ton bus the wrong way down a dual carriageway….

programme.title: E10 - Highlight 10
programme.desc: In this week’s episode Recovery Op Jim is called to the scene of two crashed artics on the M1. But as Jim and his team begin to pull the truck and trailer apart, they discover the crash has split the hydraulic oil tank and it’s now leaking all over the road making the job a whole lot more complicated! Recovery Op Rory attends what looks like a simple job, but some hidden vandalism leaves him scratching his head and needing to improvise. Rookie wrecker driver Warren faces a day on the hard shoulder of the motorway trying to rescue some highly unusual vehicles - a potentially occupied prison van and a group of shark fishers…

programme.title: E6 - Common Carp
programme.desc: Common carp are one of the most widely introduced species of fish in the world. However, most people in the U.S. won't eat them, referring to them as a 'trash fish.' Bowfisherman and fishing guide Curt Cich will tell you otherwise, as these fish are fun to bowhunt, have plenty of fresh meat and are delicious smoked. These fish are so plentiful, Curt runs a year-round full-time guiding service targeting only carp.

programme.title: E9 - Sara’s Favourites

programme.desc: As the team completes the three brutal events scheduled in 48 hours, Adam plans a surprise return to the East Coast with a Turf Games event in Sydney.

programme.title: E9 - Sara’s Favourites
programme.desc: Sara lists her top 5 experiences and we see some new recipes ala Sara that she created inspired by Australia. From an eccentric pizza entrepreneur to a game of golf with kangaroos -these are Sara's favorites.

programme.title: E1 - The Great Barrier Reef
programme.desc:
World champion freediver Marina Kazankova is on a mission, to free dive the Great Barrier Reef.
Capable of holding her breath for 7-minutes at a time, Marina travels to the iconic reef, swimming with turtles and giant groper, diving on ship wrecks and through awesome caves, all on a single breath of air.
Capturing each challenge in glorious 4K, this series brings you face to face with the very best of the Great Barrier Reef’s corals and creatures.

programme.title: E9 - Highlight 9
programme.desc: In this episode crane operator Nick, is called out to a very unusual job removing two old portable cabins from a recycling yard and replacing with new ones. But with each cabin weighing at least four tonnes and overhead electrical cables to negotiate this is a highly hazardous job. Seasoned recovery op Jim’s must rescue an abandoned Toyota from a live lane on the M1. Recovery op Rory visits a depot in Milton Keynes to recover an 8-ton tractor unit normally used to transport pizza. Meanwhile rescue driver Jon must tow a 44-ton bus the wrong way down a dual carriageway….

programme.title: E10 - Highlight 10
programme.desc: In this week’s episode Recovery Op Jim is called to the scene of two crashed artics on the M1. But as Jim and his team begin to pull the truck and trailer apart, they discover the crash has split the hydraulic oil tank and it’s now leaking all over the road making the job a whole lot more complicated! Recovery Op Rory attends what looks like a simple job, but some hidden vandalism leaves him scratching his head and needing to improvise. Rookie wrecker driver Warren faces a day on the hard shoulder of the motorway trying to rescue some highly unusual vehicles - a potentially occupied prison van and a group of shark fishers…

programme.title: E7 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1 - Joe and Shelley With AJ
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Joe and Shelly want a log home where they can live off the grid; real estate agent AJ helps them find their dream home.

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!
programme.desc: Mom's crazy inventions are going haywire! First, Arpo & Daniel have fun with the new voice-controlled smart house, until it starts having a tantrum & they have to figure out how to calm it down. Then, Mom's new time travel machine accidentally turns a pigeon into a giant pterodactyl, forcing Arpo to catch it! The mayhem continues when Daniel takes a flying smartcrib on a joyride & Arpo has to chase a remote-controlled truck that's gone out of control!

programme.title: E3 - Cody’s Football Season Training Camp
programme.desc: Get ready for game day with Cody's training camp! Imagine racing on extreme motor trikes, join friends on the playground, and go on a fun family hike. Learn about healthy foods at the grocery store to get strong for the big football season!

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E1 - Mom's Crazy Inventions Go Haywire!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E1 - From Waterfalls to Outer Space!
programme.desc: Join Gecko on his biggest adventures yet, from waterfalls to outer space! First, when Grandma's caravan rolls into a river & heads for a waterfall, Gecko must perform a daring chase to save her! Then, a lovely day at the beach becomes perilous when some vehicles get caught in the tide, requiring a helicopter rescue. The adventure blasts off as the Mechs accidentally launch their homemade spaceship to the moon & need to use solar power to get home!

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Michael continues his journey into the heart of Iraq on his way to Baghdad, and arrives in Kirkuk and the exact spot where the British discovered oil in 1927, when they also ruled the country. The next day, Michael heads towards Tikrit, Saddam Hussein's hometown. Having been stopped at several military checkpoints along the way, but is surprised when he receives a warm welcome from the local commander and coins it 'Checkpoint Cheerful'.

programme.title: E7 - 伊能靜曾糾結是否公開戀情
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E9 - 解鎖你的人生坐標
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E5 - 說唱主題日合伙人集體炸街
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E7 - 伊能靜曾糾結是否公開戀情
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E1 - 南通VS泰州
programme.desc: 「2026蘇超」由全省13個設區市分別組建1支代表隊，球隊以城市命名；分為常規賽和淘汰賽兩個階段，常規賽中，13支參賽球隊將進行主客場單循環較量，共計22輪比賽；淘汰賽階段，排名前八的球隊將採用單回合淘汰賽制產生四強，直至最終決賽。

programme.desc: Novelist Dashiell Hammett's legendary San Francisco private detective, Sam Spade, becomes enmeshed with a deadly band of international thieves who will lie, double cross and murder when he accepts an assignment from a beautiful but Dangerous Female.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: The contract is a piece of almost blank paper by which MTV binds all its employees to eight years of impecunious service. Chi-Man, an aspiring but frustrated artist, hates the contract since he is given no chance of getting ahead. He constantly thinks of moving to greener pastures. His brother Chi-Ying is a self-made investor who has just come up with a laugh bomb. By chance, Chi-Man becomes the host of a Cat TV program. With the aid of the laugh bomb, he becomes an instant success, yet...
